action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Hysell, Mayadev, Stroud, DeSanto, Arney, Brown, Cruz, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Johnson, Kirsch, McCarville, Miresse, Phelps, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sheehan, Spaude, Taylor, Tenorio, Udell, Anderson, Bare, Clancy, Emerson, Hong, Joers, Madison, Moore Omokunde, Palmeri, Sinicki, Snodgrass and Subeck; 
cosponsored by Senators Ratcliff, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Keyeski, Wall, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Larson, Roys, Spreitzer and Wirch
